title: Understanding The Place Of Artificial Intelligence In PR Practice
description: Understanding the place of Artificial Intelligence in PR practice at the 8th edition of the Lagos Digital PR Summit, with theme: “Reinventing Public Relations Proficiencies With Artificial Intelligenc
html: Understanding the place of Artificial Intelligence in PR practice at the 8th edition of the Lagos Digital PR Summit, with theme: “Reinventing Public Relations Proficiencies With Artificial Intelligence”, organized by the Nigerian Institute of Public Relations (NIPR), Lagos state chapter.
